name: assets-workspace
title: Assets Workspace
description: Assets Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/assets-workspace",
  "workspace": "assets",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "panel",
    "button",
    "media-grid",
    "agent-panel",
    "assets-app",
    "assets-home-page",
    "assets-asset-detail-page",
    "assets-asset-detail-embed-page",
    "assets-audit-page",

    "assets-brand-kits-index-page",
    "assets-brand-kits-page",

    "assets-picker-page",

    "assets-settings-page",

    "assets-asset-detail-block",
    "assets-asset-detail-embed-block",

    "assets-brand-kits-block",

    "assets-extensions-index-block",

    "assets-library-block",
    "assets-picker-block",
    "assets-run-detail-embed-block",
    "assets-settings-block",
    "assets-team-block"
  ],
  "installGraph": {
    "root": "assets-workspace",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "panel",
      "button",
      "media-grid",
      "agent-panel",
      "assets-app",
      "assets-home-page",
      "assets-asset-detail-page",

      "assets-library-detail-page",

      "assets-run-detail-embed-page",
      "assets-settings-page",
      "assets-team-page",

      "assets-asset-detail-block",
      "assets-asset-detail-embed-block",

      "assets-brand-kits-index-block",

      "assets-extensions-detail-detail-block",

      "assets-team-block"

  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    "assets",
    "asset",
    "asset",
    "audit",
    "brand-kits",
    "brand-kits",
    "brand-kits",
    "chat",
    "extensions",

    "image",
    "libraries",

    "library",
    "picker",

    "settings",

  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Assets",
    "summary": "Assets Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.assets.shell",
      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/assets"
        },
        {
          "label": "Asset Detail",
          "route": "/assets/asset/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Asset Detail Embed",
          "route": "/assets/asset/:id/embed"
        },
        {
          "label": "Audit",
          "route": "/assets/audit"
        },
        {
          "label": "Brand Kits Detail",
          "route": "/assets/brand-kits/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Brand Kits Index",
          "route": "/assets/brand-kits"
        },
        {
          "label": "Brand Kits",
          "route": "/assets/brand-kits"
        },
        {
          "label": "Chat Detail",
          "route": "/assets/chat/:threadId"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/assets",
        "page": "page.assets.home",
        "title": "Assets Home",
        "blocks": [
          "block.assets.home"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/assets/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/assets/asset/:id",
        "page": "page.assets.asset-detail",
        "title": "Asset Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.assets.asset-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/assets/app/routes/asset.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/assets/asset/:id/embed",
        "page": "page.assets.asset-detail-embed",
        "title": "Asset Detail Embed",
        "blocks": [
          "block.assets.asset-detail-embed"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/assets/app/routes/asset.$id_.embed.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/assets/audit",
        "page": "page.assets.audit",
        "title": "Audit",
        "blocks": [
          "block.assets.audit"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/assets/app/routes/audit.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/assets/brand-kits/:id",
        "page": "page.assets.brand-kits-detail",
        "title": "Brand Kits Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.assets.brand-kits-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/assets/app/routes/brand-kits.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/assets/brand-kits",
        "page": "page.assets.brand-kits-index",
        "title": "Brand Kits Index",
        "blocks": [
          "block.assets.brand-kits-index"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/assets/app/routes/brand-kits._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/assets/brand-kits",
        "page": "page.assets.brand-kits",
        "title": "Brand Kits",
        "blocks": [
          "block.assets.brand-kits"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/assets/app/routes/brand-kits.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/assets/chat/:threadId",
        "page": "page.assets.chat-detail",
        "title": "Chat Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.assets.chat-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/assets/app/routes/chat.$threadId.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/assets/extensions/:id/:slug",

        "blocks": [

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Assets template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.

upstream.importedAs: jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
